news.headline: Mark Sternberg, renowned nanomaterials innovator, joins Xeriant board of directors. Exciting times ahead for the company.
news.summary: One hundred and twenty people have tested positive for Covid-19 in a recent outbreak at a local manufacturing plant. The company has announced that they will be shutting down the plant for two weeks to conduct deep cleaning and sanitization procedures. All employees who have been in close contact with the infected individuals have been advised to self-quarantine for 14 days. The plant employs a total of 500 workers, so this represents nearly a quarter of the workforce. Health officials are monitoring the situation closely and urging anyone who may be experiencing symptoms to get tested as soon as possible.

news.headline: Amentum hosting Q2 FY25 earnings call on May 7, 2025 at 8:30 AM EDT. Results ending March 28 will be discussed. Webcast available.
news.summary: Amentum, a leading company in advanced engineering and technology solutions, will hold a conference call on May 7, 2025 at 8:30 AM EDT to review financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, which concluded on March 28, 2025. The results will be shared in a news release before the call. The conference call will be broadcasted to the public via a link on Amentum’s Investor Relations Website. A replay of the call will also be available for those unable to attend.

news.headline: Leonardo DRS sets Q1 2025 earnings call on May 1, 2025 at 10 am ET. (NASDAQ: DRS) Call will be live on investor website.
news.summary: Arlington-based company Leonardo DRS, Inc. (NASDAQ: DRS) will host a conference call on May 1, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (ET) to review its first quarter 2025 financial results. Prior to the call, the company will release its quarterly earnings report. The live audio broadcast of the conference call, along with the press release and additional details, can be accessed on Leonardo DRS’s investor relations website. This call offers investors and stakeholders the opportunity to engage with the company and its performance in Q1 2025.

news.headline: Genesys Cloud platform reaches almost $1.9B ARR in Q4 FY 2025. Genesys Cloud AI drives over 10% new business, NRR surpasses 120%.
news.summary: Global cloud company Genesys® revealed that its AI-Powered Experience Orchestration platform, Genesys Cloud™, achieved an impressive annual recurring revenue (ARR) of nearly $1.9 billion in the fourth quarter of its fiscal year 2025 (Nov. 1, 2024 – Jan. 31, 2025). The demand for Genesys Cloud AI remained strong, contributing to over 10% of new business on the platform for the entire fiscal year. Additionally, Genesys Cloud demonstrated outstanding net revenue retention (NRR) exceeding 120%, showcasing its continued growth and success in the market.

news.headline: Wasabi Technologies attains FedRAMP® Ready for GovCloud, paving the way for full certification for U.S. Federal Gov use.
news.summary: Boston-based tech company, Wasabi Technologies, unveiled its cloud storage service, Wasabi GovCloud, tailored for the U.S. Federal Government. This specialized service has successfully obtained the Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP®) Ready status. FedRAMP is a nationwide initiative streamlining security evaluations and monitoring of cloud services. By acquiring the FedRAMP Ready certification, Wasabi progresses towards achieving full FedRAMP compliance, ensuring secure and efficient cloud storage solutions for the U.S. government.

news.headline: Thoughtworks releases 32nd edition Technology Radar focusing on Generative AI, Observability, Data Management.
news.summary: In Chicago, Thoughtworks has released its 32nd edition of the Technology Radar. This edition highlights key trends such as Generative AI, evolving observability, and the future of data management.

news.headline: Assessments 24x7 introduces DISC Awareness, a unique evaluation tool combining DISC and EI assessments for better communication.
news.summary: In San Diego, Assessments 24x7, a prominent SaaS assessment technology provider, has unveiled a groundbreaking evaluation tool named DISC Awareness. This innovative tool combines DISC and Emotional Intelligence (EI) Assessment outcomes to offer comprehensive insights into communication styles, behaviors, and emotional intelligence. The objective is to assist individuals in enhancing personal interactions and achieving greater fulfillment. With a strong foundation in DISC research and implementation, Assessments 24x7 aims to revolutionize the realm of assessment tools with their new offering.

news.headline: Expansion Capital Group (ECG) names Tim Mages as CEO starting April 1, 2025. Mages, with background in finance, previously held roles as Chief Strategy Officer and CFO at ECG.
news.summary: Expansion Capital Group (ECG), a top small business capital provider, has named Tim Mages as its new Chief Executive Officer (CEO), starting April 1, 2025. Mages, formerly the Chief Strategy Officer and Chief Financial Officer at ECG, has a wealth of financial services experience. With over two decades as an investment banker and SBIC lender, he has been actively involved in aiding small businesses. Joining ECG in 2016, Mages brings valuable expertise to his new role as CEO.

news.headline: UX Wealth Partners appoints Brad Roth as their Chief Investment Officer, responsible for platform advancements and new strategies.
news.summary: Denver-based company, UX Wealth Partners, known for their AI and machine-learning investment technologies, has named Brad Roth as their new Chief Investment Officer. Roth's responsibilities will include enhancing platform integrations, developing new models, conducting advisor outreach, and overseeing investment content and education. This decision is aimed at improving the company's services and expanding their offerings to clients.

news.headline: NICE Actimize introduces X-Sight ActOne platform with Agentic AI for fraud prevention, enhancing financial crime investigations on a single platform.
news.summary: A company based in Hoboken, New Jersey, NICE Actimize, a business under NICE (NASDAQ: NICE), revealed the launch of the upgraded X-Sight ActOne. This new version builds upon the existing X-Sight platform, introducing Agentic AI features aimed at enhancing fraud and financial crime prevention strategies. The Agentic AI capabilities centralize all workflows related to fraud and financial crime prevention on a unified platform. X-Sight ActOne is designed to significantly boost efficiency in these programs, marking a notable advancement in this arena.

news.headline: Semtech unveils CopperEdge™: Low-Power 800G/1.6T Copper Solutions for AI Datacenters. New solutions for improved data center connectivity.
news.summary: Semtech Corporation (Nasdaq: SMTC) has released its CopperEdge active copper cable (ACC) and on-board equalization technology. This offering includes the GN8214, GN8224, and GN8234, which aim to enhance data center connectivity for AI/ML data center deployments. Semtech is a top provider of high-performance semiconductor, Internet of Things (IoT) systems, and cloud connectivity service solutions. The new product line is now available, marking a significant advancement in data center technology.

news.headline: Append Medical appoints Shlomi Nachman as Chairman of the Board in bid to advance LAA occlusion solutions.
news.summary: In OR YEHUDA, Israel, on April 2, 2025, a notable company, Append Medical, known for pioneering solutions in Left Atrial Appendage (LAA) occlusion, has appointed Shlomi Nachman as Chairman of the Board. This decision highlights the company's dedication to progress in the field.

news.headline: Chime marks Financial Progress Month, not just literacy. Emphasizing everyday steps, not deep knowledge or rigid benchmarks.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a leading financial technology company, Chime, is changing the narrative by celebrating Financial Progress Month® for the second year in a row during April, designated as Financial Literacy Month. Chime believes that focusing solely on "financial literacy" can be restrictive, as it tends to prioritize extensive knowledge and specific success metrics. Instead, they emphasize that financial progress is more about the incremental steps individuals take towards their financial objectives. Chime's initiative aims to underscore that true financial progress is not limited to understanding fundamental concepts.

news.headline: Regulus Therapeutics to participate in Oppenheimer Innovation on the Island Biotech Summit in 2025. CEO Jay Hagan to present.
news.summary: In San Diego on April 2, 2025, Regulus Therapeutics Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in developing revolutionary medications aiming at microRNAs, shared updates. CEO Jay Hagan is set to partake in discussions. The company is listed on Nasdaq under RGLS.

news.headline: C3 Solutions' '2025 State of Yard and Dock Management' report emphasizes automation, visibility, and sustainability trends.
news.summary: A recent report from C3 Solutions in Montreal has emphasized automation, visibility, and sustainability as critical trends in yard and dock management leading up to 2025. This analysis underscores the increasing importance of these factors in optimizing operations and enhancing efficiency. As outlined in the report, the focus on automation, visibility, and sustainability is expected to significantly impact the industry in the coming years.

news.headline: Hyundai Mobis partners with EGA for 15,000 tons of low-carbon aluminum, reducing emissions by 75% in auto components.
news.summary: A recent development in the industry has seen a company launch low-carbon aluminum production, powered by solar energy. This initiative has secured a significant contract with EGA for 15,000 tons of the low-carbon aluminum. By utilizing this innovative technology, carbon emissions are projected to decrease to a quarter of the current levels. The company has been proactive in adopting eco-friendly raw materials, demonstrating a commitment to sustainability in its operations.

news.headline: Stagwell (STGW) to host 2025 Investor Day, aiming for $5 billion revenue & $80-100 million cost savings, & simplifying capital structure.
news.summary: Stagwell, a challenger network in marketing, is hosting its 2025 Investor Day virtually to outline its vision and strategies. Initiatives include targeting $5 billion in annual revenue by 2029, $80-100 million in cost savings from AI tech, simplifying capital structure, and restructuring business units. The company aims for $5 billion revenue and $1 billion EBITDA in five years without increasing debt. Partnerships with Palantir and Adobe, and the appointment of Chief AI Officer John Kahan, highlight their focus on advanced data analytics. Stagwell reaffirms its 2025 guidance after a positive start to the year.

news.headline: Seattle Mariners upgrade production control room at T-Mobile Park in partnership with Diversified for enhanced fan experience.
news.summary: Diversified, a renowned global technology solutions provider, recently assisted the Seattle Mariners in revealing their enhanced production control room at T-Mobile Park in Plano, Texas. This upgrade allows the team to showcase games and players in innovative ways, enhancing the fan experience and strengthening the home field advantage. According to Ben, the company's representative, this development aims to elevate fan engagement and set new standards in sports venues globally.

news.headline: American Textile Maintenance projects 64% cost savings, commits to Evolectric's CircularEV™ fleet after pilot.
news.summary: After conducting successful trials, American Textile Maintenance, which oversees Republic Master Chefs and Medico Professional Linen Service, has decided to fully adopt Evolectric's CircularEV™ technology for their electric fleet. The company made this commitment in Los Angeles on April 2, 2025. This move is driven by the focus on long-term return on investment (ROI) and showcases the company's dedication to sustainability in their operations. This decision will see a significant number of vehicles within their fleet transition to the innovative CircularEV™ technology.

news.headline: Syracuse Orthopedic Specialists partners with Veradigm for financial health and efficiency. Located in NY, they aim for growth and cost reduction.
news.summary: Veradigm® (OTCMKTS: MDRX) revealed that Syracuse Orthopedic Specialists, based near Syracuse, NY, has opted for Veradigm Revenue Cycle Services and Coding Services to aid in their expansion efforts. Specializing in total orthopedic care for neighboring areas, Syracuse Orthopedic Specialists' move is aimed at enhancing cash flow, curbing expenses, and facilitating growth.

news.headline: B&H Photo ranked #6 on USA Today's list of Most Trusted Brands in America 2025, based on consumer surveys and brand reviews.
news.summary: A reputable retailer, B&H Photo, known for its wide range of photo, video, audio, computers, and tech products, has earned the notable ranking of #6 among America's 500 Most Trusted Brands 2025, as per a recent announcement. This honor was bestowed by USA Today, following a comprehensive study incorporating consumer surveys, brand reviews, social media data analysis, and thorough examination of brand sentiment. The dedication and efforts of the B&H team in achieving this recognition were highlighted in the news.

news.headline: Sentynl Therapeutics shows NULIBRY benefits in treating Molybdenum Cofactor Deficiency Type A with increased survival.
news.summary: A recent report published in the Journal of Inherited Metabolic Disease suggests that patients who received treatment with fosdenopterin experienced a notable increase in survival rates. The manuscript, which highlights the findings, points towards positive outcomes for individuals undergoing this treatment. The study was conducted by Sentynl Therapeutics, Inc., a US-owned biopharmaceutical firm under the ownership of Zydus. This development was shared on April 2, 2025, with Solana Beach, California as the location for the associated press release. This revelation showcases promising results and could potentially impact the approach to treating inherited metabolic diseases.

news.headline: Puritan's Pride® offers 7 nutritional supplement bundles, free nutrition coaching. Bridgewater,NJ. Since 1973.
news.summary: Bridgewater, New Jersey - On April 2, 2025, Puritan's Pride®, a supplement company with a long-standing reputation since 1973, revealed the introduction of seven scientifically supported nutritional bundles. In addition to this, consumers will also receive complimentary nutrition coaching. This move aims to provide customers with a reliable partner as they navigate their unique wellness paths.

news.headline: MY DR NOW opens new primary care clinic in Peoria, Arizona, offering extended hours. Located at southeast corner of Lone Mountain and El Mirage.
news.summary: In Peoria, Arizona, on April 2, 2025, MY DR NOW unveiled its latest primary care clinic. Positioned at the intersection of Lone Mountain and El Mirage in the new Fry's, the clinic aims to provide accessible and comprehensive healthcare services. MY DR NOW is known for being a prominent healthcare provider, catering to a wide range of medical needs.

news.headline: Hoth Therapeutics partners with Washington Univ. on NIH grant to advance Alzheimer's program using NK-1 Receptor Antagonist HT-ALZ.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Hoth Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed its partnership with Washington University School of Medicine in St. Louis to enhance Alzheimer's disease research. The clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, listed on NASDAQ as HOTH, aims to advance their efforts in addressing this disease. This collaboration indicates a significant step forward in the fight against Alzheimer's, potentially leading to breakthroughs in treatment options.

news.headline: Adaptiva expands OneSite Patch to Mac and Linux, offering cross-platform patching for 20,000+ products.
news.summary: A top player in self-governing endpoint management, Adaptiva from Kirkland, Washington, disclosed on April 2, 2025, that its autonomous solution, OneSite Patch, now offers a vast patch catalog covering over 20,000 products. This enhancement enables comprehensive and hassle-free patching across multiple platforms.

news.headline: Conformal Medical enrolls 500th patient in CONFORM IDE Trial for CLAAS AcuFORM device; gains clinical experience.
news.summary: A medical device company specializing in stroke prevention, Conformal Medical, Inc., recently reached a milestone by enrolling its 500th patient in the study of its advanced CLAAS® AcuFORM™ Left Atrial Appendage Device. The company, based in Nashua, N.H., has gained considerable clinical experience with the next-generation device aimed at reducing the risk of strokes. This achievement highlights the progress and success of Conformal Medical, as they continue to advance in the field of stroke prevention.

news.headline: Utimaco introduced Quantum Protect solution for post-quantum cryptography with ML-KEM, ML-DSA & hash-based signatures.
news.summary: Quantum Protect provides backing for cutting-edge Post Quantum Cryptography algorithms such as ML-KEM and ML-DSA, which have been officially recognized and standardized by NIST. Additionally, it supports established stateful hash-based signature schemes LMS and XMSS, including their multi-tree variants HSS and XMSS-MT. Moreover, Quantum Protect features a patented state management solution to enhance security.

news.headline: Lamina partners with CoBank to simplify multi-lender transactions in financial industry, starts April 2, 2025.
news.summary: Today in Chicago, on April 2, 2025, Lamina revealed a new partnership with CoBank, a cooperative bank catering to agribusinesses, rural infrastructure providers, and Farm Credit associations across the US. This collaboration aims to enhance efficiency in their multi-lender loan lifecycle process by implementing a...

news.headline: Octapharma USA: JAMA publishes Phase III trial results for 4F-PCC in cardiac surgical bleeding.
news.summary: Octapharma USA, based in Paramus, New Jersey, revealed on April 2, 2025, that the Journal of the American Medical Association (JAMA) has released findings from a Phase III clinical study. The trial demonstrated that non-activated four-factor prothrombin complex concentrate (4F-PCC) showed statistical superiority. This development signifies a significant advancement in medical research and could have groundbreaking implications for medical treatment.

news.headline: GrowGeneration launches B2B Pro Portal for commercial cultivators and retailers, using cutting-edge technology for streamlined purchasing. (characters: 114)
news.summary: GrowGeneration Corp. (NASDAQ: GRWG) has introduced its B2B Pro Portal, aimed at simplifying purchasing for commercial cultivators and retailers. This e-commerce platform, named the GrowGen Pro Portal, harnesses advanced technology to enhance procurement for commercial growers. As the nation’s largest specialty hydroponic and organic gardening retailer, GrowGen is leading the way in modernizing the industry. This move signifies the Company's commitment to providing efficient solutions, with an emphasis on streamlining operations for customers.

news.headline: Dahua Technology releases 2024 ESG Report, focusing on sustainable innovation for a smarter, greener future.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, on April 2, 2025, Dahua Technology, a top video-centric AIoT solution and service provider, unveiled its 2024 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report. This marks the initial year of their venture post over thirty years of expansion.

news.headline: Blue Yonder named 14th time Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Transportation Management Systems 2025.
news.summary: A company based in Dallas, Texas, Blue Yonder, known for digital supply chain transformation, was recognized by Gartner as a Leader in the Transportation Management Systems (TMS) Magic Quadrant. This ranking was based on Ability to Execute and Completeness of Vision. Blue Yonder attributes its accomplishment to its transportation management solutions, along with the Blue Yonder Platform and multi-tier, multi-enterprise network. This highlights the company's strong performance in the ever-changing economic environment.

news.headline: Clearco and Cavela collaborate to aid brands in managing tariffs through advanced vendor sourcing and funding. Streamlining ecommerce operations to optimize efficiency and reduce costs.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Clearco, a prominent provider of non-dilutive growth capital for thriving ecommerce firms, has revealed a significant alliance with Cavela. Cavela, known for its AI platform aiding ecommerce brands in automating product sourcing, reducing production expenditures, and managing vendor interactions, is teaming up with Clearco to enhance operational efficiency within ecommerce. This venture aims to facilitate smoother processes with suppliers, while also offering working capital to support vendor-related transactions. The collaboration is designed to optimize ecommerce operations and accelerate growth opportunities.

news.headline: iQmetrix introduces new mobile-first payments solution for telecom retail, adapting to evolving customer needs.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, customer demands in retail, especially in the realm of payment technology, are continuously changing. The shift is evident from traditional methods to modern ones like tap-to-pay and potentially cardless payments. This swift evolution necessitates businesses to prioritize providing exceptional customer experiences to thrive in the highly competitive wireless retail sector. iQmetrix, the sole provider of Interconnected Commerce in North America, understands this imperative for success in the industry.

news.headline: WNS extends strategic engagement with Delaware North, a global leader, in entertainment and hospitality services.
news.summary: WNS has recently revealed that they have expanded their strategic partnership with Delaware North, a worldwide provider of entertainment and hospitality solutions. This development signifies a continuation of the collaboration between the two companies.

news.headline: UniFirst (NYSE: UNF) reports Q2 fiscal 2025 results, ending March 1, 2025. Details on financial performance.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Massachusetts, UniFirst Corporation (NYSE: UNF) announced its financial results for the second quarter ending on March 1, 2025. The company reported on its performance compared to the same period in the previous fiscal year.

news.headline: Carvana plans IRC integration in NJ, at ADESA auction location, to expand operations. #CVNA #Newark.
news.summary: Carvana Co. (NYSE: CVNA) has revealed its intention to establish an auction and reconditioning ‘Megasite’ in central New Jersey. This move will combine Carvana’s Inspection and Reconditioning Center (IRC) functions with the current ADESA New Jersey wholesale auction site, enabling the company to broaden its production capabilities. The integrated facility will facilitate both digital and in-lane auction activities on-site, encompassing Carvana’s innovative approach to buying and selling used cars online.

news.headline: Denali Therapeutics starts BLA filing for Tividenofusp Alfa to treat Hunter Syndrome (MPS II), aiming for U.S. commercial launch in late 2025 or early 2026.
news.summary: In South San Francisco, Denali Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: DNLI) has announced the initiation of a rolling submission for a biologics license application (BLA) seeking accelerated approval for tividenofusp alfa to treat Hunter syndrome (MPS II). The application has been submitted to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration's Center for Drug Evaluation and Research (CDER). Denali is in close collaboration with CDER and is in agreement on the BLA data package, which includes the use of cerebrospinal fluid heparan sulfate (CSF HS) as a surrogate endpoint for accelerated approval. The company anticipates completing the BLA submission by the first half of May 2025 and is gearing up for a potential U.S. commercial launch between late 2025 and early 2026.

news.headline: Healthcare tech provider NASCO names Lori Logan as new President and CEO. She joined in 2023 as Chief Product and Growth Officer.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, NASCO, a top healthcare technology provider for health plans nationwide, revealed Lori Logan as its new President and CEO. Previously serving as NASCO's Chief Product and Growth Officer since 2023, Logan has now been appointed to lead the company in its future endeavors.

news.headline: ZJK Industrial Co. Ltd. named a Top 100 enterprise in Shenzhen Pingshan New District, a high-tech manufacturer for various industries.
news.summary: Today in Shenzhen, China, ZJK Industrial Co. Ltd. (NASDAQ: ZJK), a leading high-tech manufacturer specializing in precision parts for AI infrastructure, consumer electronics, electric vehicles, aerospace, and smart technologies, revealed its recognition as a Top 100 enterprise in Shenzhen Pingshan New District. The company's portfolio spans a wide range of industries and emphasizes technological advancements.

news.headline: Uni-Fuels opens UAE subsidiary and Dubai office, expanding global presence. #UniFuels #Dubai #UAE
news.summary: Singapore-based Uni-Fuels Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: UFG) has revealed its latest business expansion on April 02, 2025. The company, known for its marine fuel solutions worldwide, has now formed a subsidiary in the United Arab Emirates, with a new office launching in Dubai. This move signifies Uni-Fuels' strategic growth plan, aiming to strengthen its presence in key markets and enhance its services for a broader customer base.

news.headline: Akoya Biosciences & Team SAMBAI select PhenoCycler®-Fusion as tech for large-scale study on cancer inequities.
news.summary: Akoya Biosciences and Team SAMBAI have jointly decided to utilize the PhenoCycler®-Fusion as the primary spatial proteomics technology for an extensive research project. This selection will enable the study to analyze a large number of samples efficiently and accurately. This collaboration marks a significant advancement in the field of spatial proteomics, leveraging cutting-edge technology to further scientific research.

news.headline: DMG Blockchain Solutions releases March 2025 operational stats, led by (TSX-V: DMGI) (OTCQB: DMGGF) (FRANKFURT: 6AX).
news.summary: In Vancouver, Canada, on April 2, 2025, DMG Blockchain Solutions Inc. (TSX-V: DMGI) (OTCQB: DMGGF) (FRANKFURT: 6AX) disclosed its early operational figures for March 2025. DMG, a fully integrated blockchain and data center technology firm, shared the following data:

news.headline: Immunocore will present at investor conferences, showcasing its work to potential investors.
Opus Genetics (Nasdaq: IRD) to attend investor conference in April. CEO George Magrath to participate.
news.summary: Opus Genetics, Inc., a leading ophthalmic biotechnology company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol IRD, based in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, released a statement on April 2, 2025. The company specializes in developing gene therapies for inherited retinal diseases (IRDs) and other ophthalmic disorders. Dr. George Magrath, the CEO, is set to take part in an investor conference scheduled for April.

news.headline: Lexicon Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: LXRX) to present at 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 9 at 8:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: A company based in The Woodlands, Texas, Lexicon Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: LXRX), disclosed plans to partake in a presentation at the upcoming 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference 2025. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, April 9, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Tri Pointe Homes named to 2025 Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For list, celebrates culture and innovation; employee-first approach.
news.summary: Tri Pointe Homes has been recognized nationally for its employee-first approach and culture-driven strategy. The company has expanded its talent pipelines, wellness initiatives, and team member programs to support its workforce. This distinction highlights Tri Pointe Homes' commitment to prioritizing its employees, with a focus on creating a positive and supportive work environment.

news.headline: MidAmerica Cancer Care (MACC) opens new medical oncology clinic in Kansas City, Kansas to provide enhanced cancer care.
news.summary: A new Medical Oncology Clinic has been launched by MidAmerica Cancer Care (MACC) in Kansas City, Kansas. This clinic aims to offer superior cancer care services to the local community.

news.headline: 'Realm of Ink' wins Certificate of Merit at 4th HK Game Development Scheme, marking a significant achievement.
news.summary: The game titled "Realm of Ink" has recently been awarded a prestigious Certificate of Merit at the 4th Hong Kong Game Enhancement and Development Scheme. This accolade recognizes the game's excellence and innovation in the gaming industry. The event signifies a significant milestone for the developers of "Realm of Ink," as they competed against a substantial number of participants to secure this recognition. This achievement highlights the game's success and potential in the gaming market.
